title: Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple
tagline: Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple (கோட்டூர் கொழுந்தீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Kottur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple (கோட்டூர் கொழுந்தீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Kottur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Kozhundeeswarar. His consort, Parvati, is known as Thenambikai. The historical name of the place is Indirapuram.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (98 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Adichapuram, Akkarai Kottagam, Kilvelur block, Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple, Alathambadi.
